prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.9 kg; Height 173.7 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.1kg; 9 months ago 74.7kg; 6 months ago 75.8kg; 3 months ago 78.3kg; current 76.9kg), Height (12 months ago 173.7cm; 9 months ago 173.7cm; 6 months ago 173.7cm; 3 months ago 173.7cm; current 173.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 91mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; current 12mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 421mg/g; 9 months ago 551mg/g; 6 months ago 552mg/g; 3 months ago 374mg/g; current 735mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 139mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 9.5g/dL; 3 months ago 9.2g/dL; current 9.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
